rule_metadata.name: misc_no_dosmode_header
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.description: Detect on absence of 'DOS Mode' heaader between MZ and PE boundries

rules.rule_text:
rule misc_no_dosmode_header : suspicious
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		created = "2016-03-02"
		modified = "2016-03-02"
		university = "Carnegie Mellon University"
		description = "Detect on absence of 'DOS Mode' heaader between MZ and PE boundries"

	strings:
		$dosmode = "This program cannot be run in DOS mode."

	condition:
		ft_strict_exe and not $dosmode in ( 0x3C .. ( uint32( 0x3C ) ) )
}
